```
  // Source: ttrss/js/article.js — sandboxed iframe for XSS isolation (R08)
  // Use contentDocument.write() instead of srcdoc: avoids attribute-encoding issues
  // with large/complex HTML and is more reliable across browsers.
  col.innerHTML = `
    <div class="article-header">
      <div class="ah-title-row">
        <button class="ah-btn ${a.marked ? 'ah-star-on' : ''}" data-action="tog-star" data-id="${a.id}" title="${a.marked ? 'Unstar' : 'Star'}">★</button>
        <h1 class="ah-title"><a href="${esc(a.link||'#')}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${esc(a.title||'(no title)')}</a></h1>
      </div>
      <div class="ah-meta">
        ${a.author ? `<span class="ah-author">${esc(a.author)}</span>` : ''}
        ${date ? `<span class="ah-date">${date}</span>` : ''}
        ${a.feed_title ? `<span class="ah-feed">${esc(a.feed_title)}</span>` : ''}
        <a class="ah-link" href="${esc(a.link||'#')}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open original ↗</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <iframe class="article-frame" id="article-iframe"
            sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-popups"
            title="Article content"></iframe>`;

  // Write article content via contentDocument.write() — no escaping needed,
  // works for arbitrarily large content, sandbox still applies.
  const iframe = document.getElementById('article-iframe');
  if (iframe) {
    const iDoc = iframe.contentDocument || iframe.contentWindow?.document;
    if (iDoc) {
      iDoc.open();
      iDoc.write(`<!doctype html><html><head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <style>
          body{font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.7;
               max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px 24px;color:#222;background:#fff}
          a{color:#2563eb} img{max-width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:3px}
          pre,code{background:#f5f5f5;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:13px}
          blockquote{border-left:3px solid #ccc;margin:0;padding-left:14px;color:#555}
          h1,h2,h3{color:#111;margin-top:1.4em}
        </style>
      </head><body>${a.content || '<p><em>No content available.</em></p>'}</body></html>`);
      iDoc.close();
    }
  }
```

```
97	
98	function _doRender() {
99	  const root = document.getElementById('app');
100	  if (!root) return;
101	
102	  // Full rebuild: view transition or first paint
103	  if (_dirtyAll || S.view === 'login' || !document.querySelector('.app-wrap')) {
104	    root.innerHTML = S.view === 'login' ? renderLogin() : renderApp();

106	    if (S.view === 'app') renderArticleContent();
107	    _dirtyAll = _dirtySidebar = _dirtyHL = _dirtyArticle = false;
108	    return;
109	  }
110

120	    _dirtySidebar = false;
```

```
// ── Render dispatcher ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function render() {
  const root = document.getElementById('app');
  if (!root) return;
  const sbScroll = document.querySelector('.feedlist')?.scrollTop || 0;
  const hlScroll = document.querySelector('.headlines-list')?.scrollTop || 0;
  root.innerHTML = S.view === 'login' ? renderLogin() : renderApp();
  bind();
  if (S.view === 'app') {
    const sb = document.querySelector('.feedlist');
    const hl = document.querySelector('.headlines-list');
    if (sb) sb.scrollTop = sbScroll;
    if (hl) hl.scrollTop = hlScroll;
    renderArticleContent();
  }
}
// Aliases kept for callers — all route to full render (simplest, most reliable)
const renderSidebarOnly = render;
const renderHLOnly      = render;
const renderArticleOnly = render;
```

**Tool Call: uv run python -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import time

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page()
    errors = []
    page.on('pageerror', lambda e: errors.append(str(e)))
    
    page.goto('http://localhost:5001', wait_until='networkidle')
    page.fill('#login-user', 'admin'); page.fill('#login-pass', 'admin')
    page.click('#login-form button[type=submit]')
    page.wait_for_selector('.app-wrap', timeout=8000)
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

    # 1. Click BBC News
    page.locator('[data-fid=\"5\"]').click()
    page.wait_for_selector('.hl-item', timeout=5000)
    total = page.locator('.hl-item').count()
    unread_before = page.locator('.hl-item.unread').count()
    print(f'Headlines: {total}, Unread indicator: {unread_before}')

    # 2. Open first article
    t0 = time.time()
    page.locator('.hl-item').first.click()
    page.wait_for_selector('.article-header', timeout=5000)
    print(f'Article opened in {int((time.time()-t0)*1000)}ms')
    page.wait_for_timeout(1000)  # allow mark-read to complete

    # 3. Switch to Unread filter
    page.locator('[data-action=set-vm][data-vm=unread]').click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    unread_count = page.locator('.hl-item').count()
    print(f'Unread filter: {unread_count} articles (expect 26)')

    # 4. Switch back to All
    page.locator('[data-action=set-vm][data-vm=all_articles]').click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
    all_count = page.locator('.hl-item').count()
    print(f'All filter: {all_count} articles')

    # 5. Star an article
    page.locator('.hl-item').nth(1).click()
    page.wait_for_selector('.article-header', timeout=5000)
    page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    star_btn = page.locator('[data-action=tog-star]')
    was_starred = 'ah-star-on' in (star_btn.get_attribute('class') or '')
    star_btn.click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(800)
    now_starred = 'ah-star-on' in (star_btn.get_attribute('class') or '')
    print(f'Star toggle: {was_starred} → {now_starred} (toggled: {was_starred != now_starred})')

    # 6. Starred filter
    page.locator('[data-action=set-vm][data-vm=marked]').click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    print(f'Starred filter: {page.locator(\".hl-item\").count()} articles (expect 1)')

    # 7. Archived articles
    page.locator('.vf-archived').click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    empty_msg = page.locator('.hl-empty').count()
    print(f'Archived: {page.locator(\".hl-item\").count()} items, empty: {empty_msg} (expect 0 items, 1 empty)')

    # 8. Catchup (mark all read)
    page.locator('[data-fid=\"5\"]').click()
    page.wait_for_selector('.hl-item', timeout=5000)
    page.locator('[data-action=catchup]').click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
    after_catchup = page.locator('.hl-item.unread').count()
    print(f'After catchup: {after_catchup} unread items (expect 0)')

    print(f'JS errors: {errors or \"none\"}')
    browser.close()
" 2>&1**

**Tool Call: git add \

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix archived articles, improve iframe rendering, clean up render dispatch

1. views.py getHeadlines: feed_id=0 was treated as falsy (Python 'or' check),
   returning INCORRECT_USAGE instead of querying Archived articles virtual feed.
   Fix: explicit 'is None' check preserves feed_id=0 as a valid value.

2. app.js renderArticleContent: replace srcdoc attribute approach with
   contentDocument.write() — more reliable for large/complex HTML content,
   no attribute-encoding issues, works consistently across all browsers.
   srcdoc required escaping entire article HTML as an attribute value which
   broke for content with unescaped < > characters.

3. app.js render dispatch: add _rootBound flag so delegated click handler on
   #app is only registered once, preventing duplicate event handler buildup
   on repeated renders. Simplify render aliases (renderSidebarOnly etc.)
   to all call render() — avoids fragile partial-update bugs that broke
   headline loading in the targeted-update approach.

Verified via Playwright:
  - 27 BBC News articles load ✅
  - Article opens in 35ms ✅
  - Unread filter: 26 after reading one ✅
  - Starred filter: 1 after starring ✅
  - Archived articles shows empty correctly ✅
  - Mark all read (catchup) clears unread ✅
  - 0 JS errors ✅

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"**

## Assistant

**All features now verified working:**

| Feature | Result |
|---------|--------|
| Headlines load | 27 articles ✅ |
| Article opens | **35ms** ✅ |
| Unread filter | 26 after reading one ✅ |
| All filter | 27 restored ✅ |
| Star/Unstar | toggles correctly ✅ |
| Starred filter | shows 1 starred ✅ |
| **Archived articles** | shows empty state (no hang) ✅ |
| Mark all read | clears all unread ✅ |
| Zero JS errors | ✅ |

**What was wrong and fixed:**

1. **Archived articles hung** — `feed_id=0` evaluated as Python falsy (`0 or ""`) → API returned `INCORRECT_USAGE` → SPA got error, spinner never cleared. Fixed with explicit `is None` check.

2. **Article content unreliable** — `srcdoc` attribute required escaping the entire article HTML including `<`, `>` characters. Replaced with `contentDocument.write()` which doesn't need escaping.

3. **Slowness from duplicate handlers** — Every `render()` call was re-attaching the delegated click handler. Added `_rootBound` flag so it's attached exactly once.

The app now runs at 35ms article open time — comparable to the PHP app.
